ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CorentinJ/Real-Time-Voice-Cloning
Language: python
Clone a voice in 5 seconds to generate arbitrary speech in real-time

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FujiwaraChoki/MoneyPrinterV2
Language: python
Automate the process of making money online.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: K-Dense-AI/claude-scientific-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/K-Dense-AI/claude-scientific-skills
Language: python
A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/ReMe

ReMe: Memory Management Kit for Agents - Remember Me, Refine Me.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope
Language: python
Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/OpenSandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/OpenSandbox
Language: python
OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/deer-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
Language: python
An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skills and subagents, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/markitdown
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown
Language: python
Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: public-apis/public-apis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/public-apis/public-apis
Language: python
A collective list of free APIs
